free_text: Preequilibrium (p,n) reaction as a probe for the
cells (30.5 cm in diameter X 20.3 cm) filled with the
of plastic scintillator placed in front of and on top
of the cells for discrimination against protons and
for suppression of cosmic radiation. Five fixed
detectors used, covering angular range 0-145 degrees.
Efficiency determined relative to 7Li(p,n) to ground
and first excited state at 0 degrees.

Zero cross sections given for neutrons with energy
<29.75 MeV were excluded by compiler from data table.

at CAJaD, updated, and data sets combined.
